title: Kingdom
description: The Kingdom mod adds a variety of tools, armor, and crafting mechanics, as well as new ores.
body:
### Kingdom Mod

![Kingdom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9uXqFYSL/images/19a3d37272057d94be335ca4df0263f13924ae2c.png)

**Description:**

Transform your Minecraft experience into an epic medieval adventure with the Kingdom Mod! This mod introduces a wealth of new features and content that bring the rich, immersive world of medieval fantasy to life.

**Key Features:**

1. **New Achievements:**
   - **Heroic Defender**: Successfully defend a village from a raid, showcasing your prowess in battle and earning a prestigious title.
   - **Master Blacksmith**: Craft your first set of Silver Armor, proving your skill in forging and resource management.

2. **Saber:**
   - **Saber**: A swift and deadly weapon, perfect for quick strikes and agile combat. Ideal for players who prefer speed and precision in battles.
   
3. **Big sword**:
   - **Big sword**: A slow but powerful weapon. perfect for players who prioritize strength in combat.
   
4. **Undead Knight:**
   - **Description**: Encounter the Undead Knight, a cursed warrior risen from the grave. With high health and powerful attacks, this formidable enemy will challenge even the bravest adventurers.
   - **Why**: Defeating the Undead Knight provides rare loot and a sense of accomplishment, adding an exciting challenge to your gameplay.

5. **Silver Ore and Silver Bars:**
   - **Silver Ore**: Mine this valuable resource found deep underground. Silver Ore can be smelted into Silver Bars, essential for crafting advanced gear.
   - **Silver Bars**: A versatile material used to create powerful weapons and armor, offering enhanced protection and combat abilities.

6. **Silver Armor:**
   - **Description**: Craft a full set of Silver Armor, providing superior protection and durability. This armor is not only functional but also visually impressive, making you look like a true medieval warrior.
   - **Why**: Silver Armor offers better defense compared to traditional iron armor, giving players an edge in tough battles.

7. **Recipe book**:
   - **Recipe book**: The book has all the recipes for the anvil.
   - **How to create**: _Ironically_. Place a simple book in any crafting slot.

**Why Download:**

The Kingdom Mod enriches your Minecraft world with immersive medieval-themed content, providing new challenges, achievements, and powerful gear. Whether you're a seasoned adventurer or a new player, this mod offers something for everyone, from epic battles against undead foes to the satisfaction of crafting and wielding legendary weapons and armor. Download the Kingdom Mod now and embark on a heroic journey through a world of fantasy and adventure!
